key.name: resolution
key.description: Scale the captured video down to this size before encoding. "native" keeps the captured size. Above 1080p, raise the bitrate to match and expect a hardware encoder to be needed for a smooth stream.

key.name: bitrate-kbps
key.description: Roughly 4000 for 720p, 8000 for 1080p, 16000 for 1440p and 30000 for 4K; more for fast-moving content.

key.name: show-details
key.description: Show the transport and negotiated codecs under the active device while casting.

key.name: indicator-location
key.description: Where to show the cast indicator: the top-bar tray, or the quick settings menu.
